notes: 新增「桌面缓存兜底」:Claude 账号遇到限流、直连一时拿不到数据时,自动改读 Claude 桌面应用本地缓存的额度(零请求、不刷新 token、不碰限流桶),卡片如实标注「来自 Claude 桌面缓存 · 截至 X」。这样即便被限流,只要你本机的 Claude 桌面应用近期采过样,卡片依然有可用数字,同时下方仍保留限流现场可展开查看。仅覆盖 5 小时/本周两个窗口,数据新鲜度取决于桌面应用上次采样时间。
notes_en: Adds a desktop-cache fallback: when a Claude account is rate-limited and the direct API can't return fresh data, Tidewatch reads the usage the Claude desktop app already cached locally (zero requests, no token refresh, no rate-limit bucket) and labels the card "From Claude desktop cache, as of X". So even while rate-limited, the card still shows usable numbers as long as your local Claude desktop app has sampled recently — with the raw rate-limit response still expandable below. Covers the 5-hour and weekly windows only; freshness depends on when the desktop app last sampled.
